Word transcribed faithfully from the source PDF, or (a small minority, where the source listed too few words to form a complete family) a well-known real word built on the same root; meaning simplified to one line for the Language Garden’s writing rules (LANGUAGE_GARDEN_BIBLE §9).

meaning: to bend one knee to the ground, especially as a gesture of respect or worship
